transcript: Speaker A: Hey! Good to finally connect. How are you? Speaker B: Yes, yes sir! Sir, I'm fine. So you tell? Speaker A: So let's discuss the pricing structure and delivery timeline. Hello? Speaker B: Hello? Hello? Sir, hello? Sir, network issue, sir. Sir, I call you, I call you. Speaker C: Network issue ya confidence issue? [Network issue or confidence issue?] Speaker B: Aisa nahi ki English nahi aata. I know English, par kisi aur ke saamne confidence hi chala jaata hai. [It's not that I don't know English. I know English, but in front of someone else, my confidence just goes away.] Speaker C: Agar aisa hai, toh tumhe SpeakX use karna chahiye. [If that's the case, then you should use SpeakX.] Speaker B: Isse kya mujhe help milega? [Will this help me?] Speaker C: Yeh app mein hai SIA, aapki personal AI teacher jo tumhe English bolna sikhayegi. Agar tumne kuch galat bola, toh woh sikha deti hai. English bolne ka practice karne se confidence badhta hai. [In this app, there is SIA, your personal AI teacher who will teach you to speak English. If you say something wrong, she corrects you. Practicing speaking English builds confidence.] Speaker B: Lekin poora din toh business pe lagi rehti hoon. Itna time kaise doon? [But I am busy with business the whole day. How do I find so much time?] Speaker C: Arey meri behen, yeh AI mentor hamesha available rehti hai. Jab bhi tumhe time mile, practice kar lena. [Oh my sister, this AI mentor is always available. Whenever you get time, just practice.] Speaker B: Arey, yeh toh hum log ke liye bohot asaan cheez hai. [Oh, this is a very easy thing for us.] Speaker C: Toh aaj hi SpeakX app download karo aur trial leke English bolna shuru karo. Download the app now. [So download the SpeakX app today and start speaking English by taking a trial. Download the app now.]
on_screen_text: Hey! Good to finally connect. How are you? Yes, yes sir! Sir I'm fine. Sir you tell? So let's discuss the pricing structure and delivery timeline. Hello? Hello? Sir, hello. Hello. Sir sir sir I call you, I call you. Network issue ya confidence issue? [Network issue or confidence issue?] Aisa nahi ki English nahi aata. I know English par kisi aur ke saamne confidence hi chala jaata hai. [It's not that I don't know English. I know English, but in front of someone else, my confidence just goes away.] Agar aisa hai to tumhe SpeakX use karna chahiye. [If that's the case, then you should use SpeakX.] Isse kya mujhe help milega? [Will this help me?] Milein SIA se Aapki personal AI teacher [Meet SIA, your personal AI teacher] Lekin poora din to busy rehti hoon. Itna time kaise du? [But I am busy the whole day. How do I find so much time?] Arey meri behen yeh AI mentor hamesha available rehti hai. Jab bhi tumhe mile practice kar lena. [Oh my sister, this AI mentor is always available. Whenever you get time, just practice.] Are yeh to hum log ke liye bohot asaan cheez hai. [Oh, this is a very easy thing for us.] To aaj hi SpeakX app download karo aur trial leke English bolna shuru karo. [So download the SpeakX app today and start speaking English by taking a trial.] Download on the App Store. GET IT ON Google Play.
summary: A woman fakes a network issue on a business call due to a lack of confidence in speaking English. Her colleague recommends SpeakX, an app with an AI mentor named SIA that allows flexible, anytime practice. The ad ends with a call to download the app for a trial.
